title: Art Spiegelman: Disaster Is My Muse
original_title: Art Spiegelman: Disaster Is My Muse
overview: Explores the life and career of cartoonist Art Spiegelman including the creation and ground-breaking impact of his Pulitzer Prize-winning graphic novel MAUS.
